points.text: Erasca (ERAS) stock fell 48% ($9.25) following Revolution Medicines' patent infringement accusation regarding Erasca's pan-RAS molecular glue ERAS-0015 and a patient death one month post-dosing.
Erasca faces a securities class action alleging misleading statements on ERAS-0015 safety and intellectual property moat, resulting in a $2.8 billion market cap loss.

Erasca Inc. faces a securities class action following a $2.8 billion market cap loss after Revolution Medicines accused the company of patent infringement regarding its pan-RAS molecular glue ERAS-0015.

A patient death occurred one month after receiving Erasca's investigational pan-RAS molecular glue ERAS-0015, contributing to a 48% stock drop and allegations of misleading investors on safety profiles.

Erasca — ERAS-0015 — RAS-mutant solid tumors — Pan-RAS molecular glue program targeted by Revolution Medicines for patent infringement; patient death reported one month after dosing; securities class action filed.

Erasca — ERAS-0015 — RAS-mutant solid tumors — Pan-RAS molecular glue under development; patent infringement lawsuit filed by Revolution Medicines; patient death reported one month post-dosing; stock fell 48% to $9.25.

Erasca — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Oral investigational agent for solid tumors; in-licensed patent family from Joyo (1 issued US, 1 pending US, 1 issued foreign, 13 pending foreign); facing litigation over safety and IP claims.

Erasca — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Facing securities class action (Jan 14, 2025–Apr 26, 2026) amid patent dispute with Revolution Medicines and safety concerns; in-licensed patent family from Joyo includes one issued US patent and thirteen pending foreign applications.

ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: Investigational — Population: RAS-mutant solid tumors including pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — Comparator: Alleged favorable comparison to Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236 400 mg dose vs Erasca 40 mg dose — Adverse Event: Patient death reported one month post-dosing.

ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: Investigational — Population: RAS-mutant solid tumors including pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — Comparator: Allegedly compared 40 mg cohort to Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236 400 mg cohort — Adverse Event: One patient death reported one month post-dosing.

Erasca — Securities Class Action — ERAS-0015 — Stock dropped 48% ($9.25) to $2.8B market cap loss; Hagens Berman investigating claims of misleading investors on safety and IP protection for pan-RAS molecular glue.

Erasca — Securities litigation — ERAS-0015 — Hagens Berman Sobol Shapiro LLP investigating claims of misleading investors on safety and IP moat; class period Jan 14, 2025 to Apr 26, 2026; lead plaintiff deadline Aug 10, 2026.
